visualizations.title: Integer Multiplication & Division Signs
visualizations.description: The simple rules for determining the sign of a product or quotient.

steps.explanation: Multiplying same signs always yields a positive value.
Multiplying different signs always yields a negative value.

visualizations.title: Subtracting a Negative on the Number Line
visualizations.description: Visual proof that subtracting a negative value walks you forward (right) on the number line.
